reason_for_decision: The revised article moves past material-label marketing and explains industrial readiness through modules, thermal margin, calibration, and production discipline.
strengths: The article now distinguishes clearly between material choice and true industrial maturity.
The T/R module, thermal, calibration, and repeatability sections give the piece real engineering substance.
Buyer-facing questions are concrete and reduce the chance of purely marketing-led interpretation.
summary_assessment: This version is publishable under the stricter rubric. It now reads like a technical maturity explainer rather than a short technology-positioning note.
